Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Continued To Nov-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Morrison Fong for Theresa Hashimoto.

Mr. Fong stated that he got a petition for final distribution e-filed on Monday with a hearing date of November 8, 2017. Status of close of estate and the order to appear are off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
